description: Extend AgentProfile in agent_runtime_config.rs to support: role (string), mcp_servers (map of server configs with tool_policy), skills (vec of skill IDs), capabilities (map of bool flags), and project_overrides. Add new types: AgentToolPolicy (allowlist/blocklist with glob patterns), AgentMcpServerConfig (source: builtin|custom, tool_policy, env vars), AgentCapabilities. Keep backward compatible — all new fields are Option with defaults. Existing 'default' and 'implementation' profiles continue working unchanged.
title: Extend agent profile schema with role, mcp_servers, skills, tool_policy, and capabilities
